nodes.name: Narina trogon
nodes.summary: Narina trogon（Narina trogon，学名 Apaloderma narina），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于托海，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 托海
nodes.summary: 托海是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联22种鸟类，包括红头林鹧鸪、Cocos cuckoo、Malaysian eared nightjar等22种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The species has a large range in Africa, inhabiting lowland to highland, valley and riparian forests, from tropical to temperate regions, those occurring in highlands dispersing seasonally to lower levels

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Though it is the most widespread and catholic in habitat choice of the three Apaloderma species, their numbers are locally depleted due to deforestation. Some populations are sedentary while others undertake regular movements
